nasb.text: What right has My beloved in My house When she has done many vile deeds? Can the sacrificial flesh take away from you your disaster, So that you can rejoice?”

esv.text: What right has my beloved in my house, when she has done many vile deeds? Can even sacrificial flesh avert your doom? Can you then exult?

cnv.text: “我所愛的既然行了罪大惡極的事， 還有甚麼資格在我的殿裡呢？ 難道祭肉可以消除你的災禍， 使你得著歡樂嗎？”

ccb.text: 我所爱的子民既然罪恶滔天，还在我殿里做什么？难道祭肉可以为他们消灾免祸吗？他们以作恶为乐。
